info.title: VisibleShelf Retail Visibility Platform API
info.description: API for the VisibleShelf retail visibility platform. All authenticated routes require a Bearer JWT token.

tags.name: pre-middleware
tags.description: Routes mounted before global middleware (webhooks, client errors)

tags.name: admin
tags.description: Admin routes (users, tools, sentry, errors, catalog, etc.)

tags.name: tenant
tags.description: Tenant CRUD, profile, status, and coordinates

tags.name: infrastructure
tags.description: Health checks, cache monitoring, and platform infrastructure

tags.name: public
tags.description: Public API endpoints (no authentication required)

tags.name: shops
tags.description: shops

tags.name: directory
tags.description: Directory listings, categories, store-types, and featured stores

tags.name: items
tags.description: Items, products, categories, and photos

tags.name: storefront
tags.description: Storefront routes using materialized views

tags.name: singleton
tags.description: UniversalSingleton system routes

tags.name: checkout
tags.description: Checkout, payments, orders, and shopping carts

tags.name: integration
tags.description: OAuth, POS, GBP, GMC, Meta, TikTok integrations

tags.name: settings
tags.description: Fulfillment, commerce, tax, product options, etc.

tags.name: social
tags.description: Social proof, social pixels, and bot routes

tags.name: billing
tags.description: billing

tags.name: security
tags.description: Auth, MFA, GDPR, CCPA, sessions, and security alerts

tags.name: compliance
tags.description: GDPR, CCPA, and account deletion

tags.name: misc
tags.description: Debug, clone, queue, badges, store reviews, etc.

tags.name: organization
tags.description: Organizations, capabilities, and users

tags.name: customer
tags.description: Customer auth, addresses, notifications, and payment methods

tags.name: inventory
tags.description: inventory

tags.name: auth
tags.description: auth

post.description: Mounted BEFORE auth middleware (errors can occur pre-login)

post.description: Stripe Connect webhooks - requires raw body
